name: Prime Rate Lending Group Inc.
description_short: Chicago-based mortgage lender offering fixed-rate, adjustable-rate, FHA, VA, USDA, jumbo, and renovation loans with 20+ years of lending experience.
description_long:
Prime Rate Lending Group Inc. is a mortgage lending company based in Chicago, Illinois, operating from their office at 6501 W. Archer Ave. The company has been in the mortgage lending business for over 20 years, positioning itself as an experienced provider in the residential home financing market. They emphasize personalized service and comprehensive support throughout the mortgage process.

The company offers a diverse range of mortgage products including conventional fixed-rate and adjustable-rate mortgages, government-backed loans (FHA, VA, USDA), jumbo loans, renovation/construction loans, and refinancing options. They provide pre-approval applications, mortgage calculators, and educational resources including a home buyers guide and loan process documentation. Their website indicates they work with borrowers at various stages—from first-time homebuyers to those seeking refinancing or investment property financing.

Prime Rate distinguishes itself through personalized guidance, claiming to match borrowers with the right loan product from hundreds of available options. According to testimonials on their website, they offer relatively quick turnaround times (clients report approval within weeks rather than months) and maintain post-closing customer relationships. A staff member named Jessica Melendez receives specific praise across multiple 5-star testimonials for responsiveness, patience, and professional service. The company emphasizes competitive rates and expert guidance throughout the entire mortgage process.

The company relies entirely on website testimonials for social proof, with all available reviews dating to 2018. While the testimonials are positive and specific, there is limited third-party verification or external ratings available. The website does not display current loan rates, detailed fee structures, or specific lending criteria, which would be standard for mortgage lenders. No information is provided about licensing, regulatory certifications, or accreditations beyond the implied lending experience claimed.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Offers diverse loan programs including FHA, VA, USDA, jumbo, and renovation loans to serve different borrower types
Website testimonials report faster approval timelines compared to competitors (weeks vs. months)
Provides pre-approval process support and educational resources including home buyers guide and mortgage calculator
Claims to maintain post-closing customer relationships and ongoing support after loan completion
Over 20 years of stated lending experience in mortgage industry
Personalized service model with staff reportedly dedicated to individual borrower needs
Located in Chicago with local contact options (phone, email, physical address)
cons: No current interest rates, APRs, or specific fee schedules displayed on website
All available customer testimonials are from 2018 with no recent reviews or third-party ratings visible
Website does not clearly state licensing, certifications, or regulatory accreditations
Limited information about lending criteria, minimum credit scores, or debt-to-income requirements
No transparency about loan processing times, closing costs, or standard terms offered
best_for: First-time homebuyers seeking personalized guidance and educational support through the mortgage process
Military veterans and rural property buyers interested in VA and USDA loan products
Homeowners seeking refinancing or renovation financing in the Chicago area
diagnosis: Prime Rate Lending Group is best for Chicago-area homebuyers and existing homeowners seeking personalized mortgage service with multiple loan program options. The main caveat is that the company provides no current pricing, rate, or fee information online, and all available customer reviews date to 2018, making it difficult to assess current service quality or competitiveness without direct contact.
services: USDA mortgage programs for rural properties
Home buyers guide and educational resources
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
